title: peiranisia benitoensis
intro: Peiranisia benitoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Philippines. It is also known as Benito's peiranisia or Benito's peirania, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Peiranisia benitoensis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Peiranisia benitoensis can be used as a decoction or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
